description.value:
A wand carved from blackened bone, capped with a garnet that pulses when spells are prepared. It grants +1 to spell attack rolls for one school (evocation) while held.

Curse. Each time the attuned caster finishes casting a leveled spell through the wand, they lose 1 maximum hit point until the curse is broken (minimum half their normal maximum). Lost maximum HP returns only when the curse ends or via wish-level magic.

unidentified.description: A bone wand with a deep red stone. It thrums when you shape a spell.

cursedMeta.decoyAppearance: +1 spell attack focus for evocation; carved bone and fire-garnet cap.
cursedMeta.trueNature: Each leveled spell cast through the focus permanently reduces the caster's maximum HP by 1 until the curse ends (floor half normal max).

curse.name: Harrowbone Tithe
curse.description: Each time the attuned user casts a spell of 1st level or higher using this wand as focus, they lose 1 maximum hit point until the curse is removed. Maximum HP cannot be reduced below half its starting value by this curse alone.

hints: The garnet brightens when HP are lost, as if tallying a debt.

escalation.effect: Brief nosebleeds after big spells; dismissed as strain.
Rests no longer feel refreshing; max HP bar looks shorter on the sheet.
